creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This is true, and it doesn't look like it will be fixed any time soon given 
that gdm 2.22 will be a rewrite.  However, there is a very easy workaround. 
Add the following to ~/.profile: 

GDM_LANG=de_DE.ISO8859-15 ; export GDM_LANG 

That will set your locale accordingly when you login through GDM.
